verified.title: OEM Non-Latex Makeup Blending Sponge
verified.description: Ultra-soft, non-sensitive, flake-resistant, long-wearing dual-use (wet/dry) blending sponge that expands when wet. Suitable for foundation, cream, blush, and concealer application.
verified.cost_source_moq: US$0.35-0.98/unit, MOQ 3,000 pieces, per made-in-china.com listing
verified.quality_differentiator: Non-latex polyurethane construction explicitly marketed as an eco-friendly material progression (moved away from latex materials); 18,000,000 pcs/year production capacity signals an established, real manufacturer, not a reseller.
verified.verification_evidence: made-in-china.com listing loaded via WebFetch confirmed supplier name, price range $0.35-0.98, MOQ 3,000. Image curl-verified HTTP 200, downloaded and visually inspected -- clean teal teardrop sponge on white background, no text/watermark/logo.

verified.title: Private Label Latex-Free Foundation Blending Beauty Sponge
verified.description: Hydrophilic non-latex sponge, expands to roughly twice its size when wet, dual-ended design (rounded end for cheeks, pointed tip for precision around eyes/nose). Available in multiple shapes and colors.
verified.cost_source_moq: US$0.28-0.45/piece; MOQ 2,000 standard, 500-2,000 for OEM/customized; free stock samples within 2 days per listing
verified.quality_differentiator: Low MOQ for OEM customization (500 units) vs typical 3,000+ minimums, real named Shenzhen manufacturer, hydrophilic non-latex material claim with explicit allergy-reduction rationale.
verified.verification_evidence: made-in-china.com listing loaded via WebFetch confirmed supplier name, price $0.28-0.45, MOQ tiers. Image curl-verified HTTP 200, downloaded and visually inspected -- clean green teardrop sponge with its clear retail cylinder packaging shown alongside, no text/watermark/logo on either.

packaging_category_note: Zero fully-clean packaging images found yet in this pass. Real suppliers exist (gzblfpacking.en.made-in-china.com magnetic eyelash box, igiftbox.en.made-in-china.com PVC-window box, cnvistapak.en.made-in-china.com tray-insert box) but every candidate photo checked so far has a watermark ('iGiftBox' logo) or the supplier's own branding baked into the box design ('VIC LASHES' gold foil, 'My Only BFF' print) -- correctly excluded per the no-text rule rather than included as a compromise. Needs another pass specifically hunting for blank/customizable mockup photos before packaging SKUs can be marked verified.

partially_verified.title: Professional Makeup Sponge - Latex-Free Beauty Blender
partially_verified.description: Professional makeup sponge. Latex-free PU material. Soft texture for liquid and cream foundation application. Tear-resistant.
partially_verified.cost_source_moq: Site lists 'contact for pricing/MOQ' only, no listed price found
partially_verified.quality_differentiator: Specialized sponge manufacturer (not a generalist). Latex-free PU. OEM available. Tear-resistant construction.
partially_verified.verification_evidence: leadingsponge.com is a real direct-factory site with a dedicated product page for this sponge; image URL confirmed HTTP 200 and shows a clean pink teardrop makeup sponge with no text/logo overlay.
